untranslatable_reason: Signal requires external fundamental data (EPS growth rate YoY, stock underperformance vs sector, broad market regime confirmation) and multi-asset regime tracking (SPX consecutive days positive/negative) that are not available in the allowed indicator set. The allowed indicators are limited to single-asset price/volume/technical metrics and cannot access earnings data, sector relative performance, or index-level regime state.
translation_notes: Attempted to translate only the volume conviction signal (vol_ratio_20 > 1.2) and the price target exit (20% return threshold). The core logic—EPS growth screening, sector underperformance detection, and SPX regime shifts—cannot be expressed with the available indicators and would require external data feeds and multi-asset state tracking.
